    A

    addAnswer(Answer) - Method in class application.Question
    Adds an answer to the List of Answers for this question.
    addAnswerFeedback(AnswerFeedback) - Method in class databasePart1.DatabaseHelper
    Adds feedback/comment to an answer

    Adds a blocking error

    Method to add corrections

    Method to add error
    addFavorite(String) - Method in class application.User
    Adds a favorite item to the user's favorites list.

    Method to add a reviewer to a users list of favorites.
    addPrivateMessage(int, String, String, String, String) - Method in class databasePart1.DatabaseHelper
    Creates a private feedback message.
    addReview(int, String, String) - Method in class databasePart1.DatabaseHelper
    Adds a review to an answer
    addReview(Answer) - Method in class application.StudentQAPage
    Method to add a review.
    addReviewReply(int, String, String) - Method in class databasePart1.DatabaseHelper
    Adds a reply to an existing review.
    addWarning(String) - Method in class application.InputValidator.ValidationReport
    Adds a warning

    AdminHomePage - Class in application
    AdminPage class represents the user interface for the admin user.

    The SetupAdmin class handles the setup process for creating an administrator account.

    Answer - Class in application
    Represents an answer to a question in the Q&A system.
